Simple Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start free, upgrade when you're ready. All plans include core search functionality.

Free

$0forever

Perfect for occasional buyers who want to try the platform.

Basic search
Limited price history (30 days)
View 5 sold prices/month
Email support
Price alerts
Market reports
API access
Bulk exports
Most Popular

Pro

$29/month

For serious buyers and sellers who need full access.

Advanced search filters
Full price history
Unlimited sold prices
Price drop alerts (10)
Monthly market reports
Priority support
API access
Bulk exports

Dealer

$299/month

For dealerships and professionals who need it all.

Everything in Pro
API access (10k calls/month)
Bulk data exports
Advanced analytics
White-label reports
Unlimited alerts
Dedicated account manager
Custom integrations

Need Enterprise Features?

Custom data feeds, dedicated infrastructure, and bespoke integrations for large organizations. We work with finance companies, insurers, and enterprise dealers.

Custom data feeds
Dedicated infrastructure
SLA guarantees
Bespoke integrations
Volume pricing
On-premise options

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I change plans at any time?

Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

Is there a free trial for paid plans?

Yes, all paid plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

What payment methods do you accept?

We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and PayPal. Dealer plans can also be paid via invoice.

Can I get a refund?

We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a full refund.

AutoHarvester

The largest database of sold car prices in Australia. See what cars actually sold for, not just what they're listed at.
